ab: lokah ta kwara, kisa ga rasun cimu nya psba biru mosa ta alang Tayal mita bkis.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: myasa ci! ita ru bkis ga pkayan ta ke Tayal.
ch: B:好喔!我們跟耆老要說泰雅語。

ab: obeh ta tehok la?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: iyat kinga tehok la.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: uba, nyu cami mwah mita isu la.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: talagay! kba cimu kmayan ke Tayal! talagay myasa ci!
ch: B:你們會說泰雅語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You guys speak Thai! That’s great!

ab: lokah ta kwara, kisa ga rasun cimu nya psba biru mosa ta mtiyaw mayah lmyun.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: psba biru, mosa cami kwara myan.
en: B: Teacher, we all have to go.

ab: uwah mlahuy kwara, aras y’aya mamu.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，帶著你們的工具。
en: A: Come and line up and bring your tools.

ab: aw, psba biru, nyu cami maras y’aya la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都帶工具了。
en: B: Yes, teacher, we’ve brought our tools.

ab: nyu ta tehok la?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ini tehok nya, theya ci nya.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: isu usa kmikis ’sya.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: aw, kinang mwah kmikis ’sya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: isu usa magan tapang psosaw piyit.
en: A: You go get the birdcatcher.

ab: aw, kinang mosa psosaw piyit.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: lokah ta kwara, mosa ta mita yngayan ksinu kisa.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: talagay myasa! kusa ta kenu mosa?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: pgluw ta glgan basu mosa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: ble mlahuy kwara, lama ta bayi kipu la.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: angu.
en: B: Yes.

ab: gleng nya ga gluw piyit, suruw nya ga gluw m’u, ble nanak usa mita.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，自己好好參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: psba biru, mngungu cu m’u.
en: B: Teacher, I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: iya kngungu, nanu usa mita piyit isu.
en: A: Don’t worry, then you go and see the birds.

ab: babaw utux tmuting lga uwah mlahuy kwara ta.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: ang, mhway su psba biru.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: lalu waya su texan soni?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: piyux ci m’u waya mu texan, piyux ci piyit uyi.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: nahay hayi, mosa ta la.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: ngwey cu cikah, m’wix ci kakay mu.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: s’un ta mosa mlngya ga?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: ang, nanu hata la!
en: B:Yes! Then let’s go!

ab: piyux ci c’oli nya nyu mlngya cahay.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: haca ga iyik ci ’sya nya, mlngya ta cahay lga yaca la.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
